---
title: "Insurance_Value_Analysis"
author: "Marius Munschek"
date: "2025-12-05"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

```

```{r}
by_SR <- synthDat %>%
  group_by(sowndiv) %>%
  summarise(
    mu_SR = mean(profit_mean, na.rm = TRUE),  # mean profit €/ha
    CV_SR = mean(CV,           na.rm = TRUE), # mean CV of profit
    RP_SR = mean(RP,           na.rm = TRUE), # mean risk premium €/ha
    CE_SR = mean(CE,           na.rm = TRUE), # mean certainty equivalent €/ha
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
SR0 <- min(by_SR$sowndiv)   # or choose any other baseline

RP0 <- by_SR$RP_SR[by_SR$sowndiv == SR0]
CE0 <- by_SR$CE_SR[by_SR$sowndiv == SR0]

by_SR <- by_SR %>%
  mutate(
    insurance_RP = RP0 - RP_SR,   # €/ha reduction in risk premium vs baseline
    insurance_CE = CE_SR - CE0    # €/ha gain in certainty equivalent vs baseline
  )

```

```{r}
# quadratic fit of CV vs richness, using plot-level data:
quad <- lm(CV ~ sowndiv + I(sowndiv^2), data = synthDat)

dCVdSR <- function(SR) {
  c <- coef(quad)
  c[2] + 2 * c[3] * SR
}

by_SR <- by_SR %>%
  mutate(
    dCVdSR          = dCVdSR(sowndiv),
    insurance_index = - sowndiv * dCVdSR   # dimensionless stability index
  )

```

```{r}
by_SR_pub <- by_SR %>%
  select(
    sowndiv,
    mu_SR,
    CV_SR,
    RP_SR,
    CE_SR,
    insurance_RP,
    insurance_CE
  )


write.csv(by_SR_pub, "C:/Users/mm68tulo/Desktop/Jena Chapter/Data Analysis/1_Data/by_SR_publication.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
